zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Hancock於1520年出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親John Hancock14歲，母親Mary Leeke14歲。他於1563年10月12日與Elizabeth Maxwell在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇 阿爾蓋特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1589年在英國英格蘭倫敦易阿林聖 馬也斯享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可巴爾金。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Hancock于1520年出生在英国倫敦时，他的父亲John Hancock14岁，母亲Mary Leeke14岁。他于1563年10月12日与Elizabeth Maxwell在英国英格兰倫敦聖 波托爾福也斯 邱奇 阿爾蓋特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1589年在英国英格兰倫敦易阿林聖 馬也斯享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可巴爾金。

nameMeanings.name: Hancock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hann + the hypocoristic suffix -cok, which was commonly added to personal names (see Cocke ).
Dutch: from Middle Dutch hanecoc ‘winkle, periwinkle’ (a type of shellfish), probably a metonymic occupational name for someone who gathered and sold shellfish.

History: Thomas Hancock, the uncle of Declaration of Independence signatory John Hancock (1736/7–93), was among the foremost of 18th-century American businessmen. He was a descendant of Nathaniel Hancock, who was known to have been in Cambridge, MA, as early as 1634. Born in Braintree, MA, John Hancock was president of the Second Continental Congress and the first governor of the state of MA.

variants.name: Hancox
meanings: English: variant of Hancock , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Handcock
meanings: English: variant of Hancock with intrusive -d-.

variants.name: Hann
meanings: German and Dutch: from a shortened pet form of the personal name Johann (see John ).

English: from the Middle English personal name Hann, commonly a pet form of Henry (Middle English Hanry). Hann could also be a rhyming pet form of Randolph (Middle English Randal, shortened to Ran or Rand). Han was also a pet form of Joh(a)n in Middle Dutch, and it is possible that this usage was brought to England by Flemings after the Norman Conquest, but no evidence has yet been found that it was similarly used in Middle English. See Henry and Randall , and compare Hankin , Hancock , and Hanks .
English: variant of Ann with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Hancock was born in 1520, in London, England, his father, John Hancock, was 14 and his mother, Mary Leeke, was 14. He married Elizabeth Maxwell on 12 October 1563, in Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1589, in St Mary's, Ealing, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Barking, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Hancock est né en 1520, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, John Hancock, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Mary Leeke, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Maxwell le 12 octobre 1563, à Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1589, à St Mary's, Ealing, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Barking, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Hancock 1520 in London, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hancock 14 und seine Mutter Mary Leeke 14. Er hat am 12. Oktober 1563 in Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Maxwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1589 im Alter von 69 Jahren in St Mary's, Ealing, London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Barking, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Hancock è nato il nel 1520 nel London, England, il suo padre, John Hancock, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Mary Leeke, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Maxwell il 12 ottobre 1563, nel Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1589, nel St Mary's, Ealing, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Barking, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Hancockが1520年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父John Hancockは14歳，母Mary Leekeは14歳であった。1563年10月12日にイギリスイギリスロンドンサイント ボトルフ'ス チャーチ アルドガトでElizabeth Maxwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1589年にイギリスイギリスロンドンエアリングスト マリ'スで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスバーキングにて埋葬された。

ko.St Botolph Aldgate, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 세인트 벗프'스 c후르치 알드가트
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Hancock(이)가 1520년 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hancock(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Leeke(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1563년 10월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 세인트 벗프'스 c후르치 알드가트에서 Elizabeth Maxwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1589년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 올잉 스트 마이'스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 바킨그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Hancock nasceu em 1520, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hancock, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Mary Leeke, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Maxwell em 12 de outubro de 1563, em Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1589, em St Mary's, Ealing, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Barking, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Hancock родился в 1520 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Hancock было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Leeke, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Maxwell 12 октября 1563 г. в местности сеинт ботолф'с чурч алджэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1589 г. в местности ст мэри'с, эалинг, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности баркинг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Hancock nació en 1520, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, John Hancock, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Mary Leeke, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Maxwell el 12 de octubre de 1563, en Saint Botolph's Church Aldgate, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1589, en St Mary's, Ealing, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Barking, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
